Mac App — Hello World

Session 1 of the migration is live.

✓ GitHub repository created
✓ GitHub Actions build pipeline active
✓ Tauri shell compiled — universal macOS binary
✓ Native window rendered via WebKit
Phase Session 1 — scaffold + pipeline Stack Tauri 2 + Rust + WebKit Build universal-apple-darwin Today —
Next: Session 2 — design the SQLite schema and wire up the storage adapter that replaces localStorage. The existing CRM HTML stays untouched on your usual workflow throughout.
If you can read this, the build pipeline is verified end-to-end.
